creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
Well, it is the same reason NOPORTDOCS is being used - if a user
requests a minimal install without documentation and without manpages,
too. If you are installing FreeBSD, you may chose the Minimal Install
and no manpages are installed. Unlike NOPORTDOCS this knob is optional,
but I (and many other maintainers) include it in maintained ports. So it
is up to your decision.

Best regards,
mm

Mikhail Teterin  wrote / napísal(a):
> Martin, what purpose would this serve? Are the man-pages considered evil under 
> some circumstances? Yours,
>
>  -mi
>
